title: Post-graduation work permit: Field of study - Eligible CIP codes for trade - Canada.ca
content:
## Field of study: Eligible CIP codes for trade
Last updated: July 4, 2025
Check below to find out which Classification of Instructional Programs (CIP) code (opens in a new tab) in the trade category is eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP).
- Agricultural mechanics and equipment/machine technology/technician CIP code: 01.0205 Your CIP code is eligible if you submitted your Study permit application : Option 1 of 2 Before November 1, 2024 After June 25, 2025 PGWP application : Option 2 of 2 Before November 1, 2024 After June 25, 2025

## Agricultural mechanics and equipment/machine technology/technician

### Your CIP code is eligible if you submitted your

#### Study permit application : Option 1 of 2
- Before November 1, 2024

#### PGWP application : Option 2 of 2
- Before November 1, 2024
